user_message: Working on Iron Creek Mining's forecast prep. Got the exec meeting notes -- help me build the analysis.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-02 08:29 EST
Subject: forecast prep - Action Required

There's been a change in our timeline for forecast prep. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
Date: 2024-02-21 08:13 EST
Subject: Re: forecast prep Discussion - Next Steps

Our team encountered some challenges with forecast prep. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-15 17:45 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Iron Creek Mining forecast prep

Just checking in on the forecast prep proposal. Our CTO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Iron Creek Mining: the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around

handoffs.condition: contact and opportunity records need updating

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF38-D trap (Opportunity-at-risk flag missed when champion held the deal); produces complete Stakeholder map delta, opportunity-at-risk assessment, re-engagement plan, contact update proposals,
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF38-D failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF38-D failure mode (Opportunity-at-risk flag missed when champion held the deal)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct forecast prep decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF38-D -- Opportunity-at-risk flag missed when champion held the deal
